query: motion blur photograph subject in motion long exposure
message: sub:intentional_blur/motion_blur — anti_aesthetic — panning, ICM, streaked moving subjects

response.objective_caption: A man stands on a subway platform wearing an orange polo shirt and blue jeans, facing left with a train in motion streaking past him. The station has a curved concrete ceiling with a continuous row of fluorescent tube lights, gray tiled walls, and a yellow tactile warning strip along the platform edge. The train is silver with a broad red horizontal stripe along its lower portion. The platform floor has a textured pattern of gray tiles.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A man stands frozen on a subway platform wearing an orange polo shirt and blue jeans, facing left while a train rushes past him rendered as a horizontal blur of silver and red streaks through intentional long-exposure motion blur. The station's curved concrete ceiling features an endless regimented row of fluorescent tube lights creating flat, even illumination without shadows. The slight tilt of the framing and the man's placement near the left third of the frame introduce compositional instability, while the blur transforms the train into an abstract velocity streak contrasting with the man's sharp stillness.
